# Rectangle with a gentle outward-bulging arc on the right side.
# Negative bulge = CW-perp side of start→end = +x for a vertical
# chord going +y, so the arc sweeps OUTWARD into +x.

polygon outer
(0,0)
(200,0) arc=-0.3
(200,200)
(0,200)
----
polygon outer 4 vertices, ccw, bbox (0,0)-(200,200), area 40000

set stall-angle=90
----

generate
----
total_stalls: 70
faces: 7 (boundary: 1, interior: 6)
graph: 17 vertices, 24 edges (perimeter: 14, interior: 10)
regions: 1
